---
This is a screenshot of a software application, likely an AI image generation tool, given the terminology and the visual elements. The interface is primarily in French.

**Overall Layout:**
The screen is divided into several vertical sections: a navigation sidebar on the left, a main workspace area in the center, and potentially a larger viewing/output area to the right (though the main focus is on the central panel).

**Left Sidebar (Navigation):**
This sidebar contains the main sections of the application:

*   **Top Section (Project/Main Menu):**
    *   A section labeled "Création" (Creation).
    *   Underneath, there are options:
        *   **"Forge ton idée"** (Forge your idea) - This appears to be the currently selected section.
        *   "Génération d'image" (Image Generation).
        *   "Générer une vidéo" (Generate a video).
        *   "File d'attente" (Waiting line) with a notification badge showing "1".
    *   **"Outils"** (Tools) section follows.
    *   Under "Outils," there are options like:
        *   "Supprimer l'arrière..." (Remove the background...).
        *   "Upscale".
        *   "Créer un LoRA".
    *   **"Bibliothèque"** (Library) section:
        *   "Bibliothèque" (Library).
        *   "Adaptateurs LoRA".
    *   **"Réglages"** (Settings) section:
        *   "Modèles" (Models).
        *   "Préférences" (Preferences).
        *   "Cache".
    *   **"Aide"** (Help) section:
        *   "Documentation".
        *   "Site web & Support".

**Central Workspace (Main Focus):**
This is where the current activity is taking place.

*   **Top Bar/Title:** The main title is **"Forge ton idée"** (Forge your idea).
*   **Activity Controls:** Below the title, there are two buttons:
    *   "Nouvelle idée" (New idea).
    *   A green button labeled **"Auto-sauve"** (Auto-save), which is currently selected.
